CREATE TABLE time_data (event_time DateTime, event_value UInt32);
SELECT DISTINCT tumbleEnd(event_time, toIntervalHour(6)) FROM time_data GROUP BY event_value;
SELECT (SELECT tumbleEnd(event_time, toIntervalHour(1)) FROM time_data WHERE event_value = 1) AS first_window_end;
SELECT t.event_value, tumbleEnd(t.event_time, toIntervalMinute(30)) FROM time_data AS t JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT event_value FROM time_data) AS d ON t.event_value = d.event_value;
SELECT (tumbleEnd(event_time, toIntervalDay(1)) + toIntervalHour(3)) AS adjusted_end FROM time_data WHERE event_value < 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT tumbleEnd(event_time, toIntervalHour(1)) FROM time_data GROUP BY event_value) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE timezone_data (event_time DateTime, event_value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT tumbleEnd(event_time, toIntervalHour(1), 'Europe/London') AS london_end FROM timezone_data;
SELECT event_value, tumbleEnd(event_time, toIntervalDay(1)) FROM timezone_data WHERE event_time > now() - toIntervalDay(5) ORDER BY event_time;
